about.textTwo: Besides within the web designing and development area every sector I want to deliver my best. I always try to maintain performance with achievements. Actually I am not a successful programmer but I want to be also successful. Because the program is my way & programming is my passion. If you think? I will help you with your project...🤝🏾 yes, I am ready to assist you InsyaAllah.

plugin.name: Datatable
plugin.text:
>$('#summernote').summernote({
          placeholder: 'Hello stand alone ui',
          tabsize: 2,
          height: 120,
          toolbar: [
          ['style', ['style']],
          ['font', ['bold', 'underline', 'clear']],
          ['color', ['color']],
          ['para', ['ul', 'ol', 'paragraph']],
          ['table', ['table']],
          ['insert', ['link', 'picture', 'video']],
          ['view', ['fullscreen', 'codeview', 'help']]
          ]</xmp>
